name: Meow Time Machine: Newton
short_description: This is an immersive hidden object puzzle game that takes you through time to explore the extraordinary life of physics genius Isaac Newton. From the inspiration under the apple tree to the publication of 'Principia Mathematica', from Trinity College Cambridge to the Royal Society, every step is a journey into scientific mysteries.
detailed_description:
Apples and Stars: Newton's Scientific Journey

This is an immersive hidden object puzzle game that takes you through time to explore the extraordinary life of physics genius Isaac Newton. From the inspiration under the apple tree to the publication of 'Principia Mathematica', from Trinity College Cambridge to the Royal Society, every step is a journey into scientific mysteries.

Scientific Journey

Embark on a five-chapter scientific adventure, from Newton's gravitational inspiration in the Woolsthorpe orchard, through optical experiments at Cambridge, mathematical innovations, telescope demonstrations at the Royal Society, to the birth of his great work. In each carefully designed scene, you'll collect items intimately connected to Newton's scientific research, piecing together the puzzle of a scientific giant's wisdom.

Unique Gaming Experience

  • Beautifully Illustrated Scenes: Reimagining the life and research spaces of a scientific master in an adorable style

  • Scientific Exploration: Experience the joy of scientific discovery in English countryside orchards, Cambridge college laboratories, and Royal Society halls

  • Engaging Tasks: Team up with Newton's feline companions to collect scientific equipment and materials, exploring the mysteries of physics and mathematics

  • History of Science: Learn about the foundation of classical physics through gameplay and feel Newton's profound influence on modern science

Game Features

  • Five carefully designed chapters, each telling a key scientific stage in Newton's life

  • Dozens of unique scenes, from country manors to academic halls

  • Dozens of key collectible items

  • Side quests with cat companions

Game Instructions

  • This is a small hidden object puzzle game with five chapters, total gameplay time is approximately 1-2 hours

  • Click on the left and right sides of the book to turn pages

  • Press Esc to exit the game

  • The overall difficulty is moderate, suitable for science enthusiasts of all ages

Embark on this wonderful journey, explore Newton's scientific world, and discover the inspiration and stories behind classical physics!

supported_languages: English, French, German, Russian, Turkish, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Portuguese - Portugal, Arabic
